{{CargoClone
|name=God of Prosperity
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=177
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=Resolver: W-tads extracted +9
|gene4=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Dragon Minion Cloning SPD +1.2%
|gene6=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Dragon Minion Cloning SPD +2%
|}}
